source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for calm English scheduling UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, compact calendar views, tabular time, and relaxed operational scanning.
layout: Precise 8px grids, 8px cards, sage-stem dividers, lavender event chips, quiet field-cream panels, and restrained shadows for scheduling and resource planning.

prompts.label: Transparent lavender sprig motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only isolated lavender sprigs for a design-system motif cutout, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A small natural bundle of lavender sprigs that clearly reads as real lavender: many recognizable narrow upright purple flower spikes made of tiny buds, slender sage-green stems, narrow sage leaves, and only tiny dry-straw warmth on a few woody stem tips. Not generic purple flowers, not broad petals, not lilacs.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; show full stems and flower tips without cropping; airy botanical silhouette.
Lighting/mood: clean even studio light preserving lavender-purple buds, sage-green stems/leaves, and subtle dry-straw stem warmth.
Chroma-key workflow: generate on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background, copy the exact generated source to .source/motif-chroma.png, then remove the key with remove_chroma_key.py using auto-key border, soft matte, and despill. The final motif.png is RGBA transparent with transparent corners.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no ribbon, no vase, no field background, no bouquet wrap, no broad flower petals, no extra flowers, no shadow.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive high-resolution 16:9 light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Lavender", derived from the isolated lavender sprig motif: narrow lavender-purple flower spikes, sage-green stems/leaves, dry-straw stem hints, Provence field calm.
Reference use: Treat the lavender motif as the source of truth. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from lavender-purple buds, deeper violet shadows, sage stems, dry straw, field cream, and soft grey botanical texture.
Required visible sections: header "Lavender Design System" and "Calm scheduling system"; Palette; Typography; Japanese Typography; Buttons; Inputs; Select; Textarea; Checkbox; Radio; Switch; Tabs; Badges; Alerts; Cards; Navigation; Sidebar; Command/Search; Tables; Charts; Empty State; Error State; Loading State; Spacing; Radius; Shadow; Texture/Pattern; Calendar App Preview.
Palette swatches: Lavender Purple, Deep Violet, Sage Green, Dry Straw, Field Cream, Soft Grey, Pale Lavender, Lavender Ink. Show readable hex-style labels.
Typography guidance: English and Japanese examples, with labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, Calendar time.
Components: shadcn/tweakcn style, 8px card radius, lavender primary buttons, sage secondary/support, dry straw warning/accent, cream surfaces, soft grey borders, visible focus rings, calm calendar density.
Calendar app preview: scheduling dashboard with mini month calendar, agenda list, resource lanes, event chips, command search, sidebar navigation, charts, and table rows.
Texture guidance: subtle lavender sprig line pattern, linen field cream grain, sage stem dividers, not decorative blobs.
Text: short readable UI labels only; include English and Japanese typography samples. Ensure "Lavender", "Calm scheduling", "Typography", "日本語", "Palette", "Calendar", "Buttons", and "Tokens" are legible.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple gradients, no stock UI kit, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of Lavender, no dark-mode board in this image.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one separate high-resolution 16:9 dark-mode design-system board for the same Morphous theme named "Lavender". It must feel like the light Lavender design-system board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the lavender sprig motif and the light Lavender board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, calm scheduling component language, component coverage, spacing, typography, sage stem dividers, dry-straw accents, and lavender sprig texture.
Required visible sections: header "Lavender Dark Mode" and "Calm scheduling system"; Palette; Typography; Japanese Typography; Buttons; Inputs; Select; Textarea; Checkbox; Radio; Switch; Tabs; Badges; Alerts; Cards; Navigation; Sidebar; Command/Search; Tables; Charts; Empty State; Error State; Loading State; Spacing; Radius; Shadow; Texture/Pattern; Calendar App Preview.
Dark palette: deep violet and lavender-charcoal surfaces, lavender purple highlights, pale lavender text, sage green accents, dry straw warning/accent, field cream only as small text/highlight, soft grey borders, lavender ink depths. Keep colors faithful to lavender, not neon purple.
Typography guidance: readable English and Japanese examples, with labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, Calendar time.
Components: shadcn/tweakcn style, 8px card radius, dark cards and popovers, lavender primary buttons, sage secondary/support, dry straw warning/accent, visible focus rings, readable form labels, tabs, badges, alerts, command palette, table rows, charts, loading skeletons.
Calendar app preview: dark scheduling dashboard with mini month calendar, agenda list, resource lanes, event chips, command search, sidebar navigation, charts, and table rows.
Texture guidance: subtle lavender sprig line pattern and linen grain in dark surfaces; sage stem dividers; not decorative blobs.
Text: short readable UI labels only; include English and Japanese typography samples. Ensure "Lavender", "Dark Mode", "Calm scheduling", "Typography", "日本語", "Palette", "Calendar", "Buttons", and "Tokens" are legible.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no unrelated saturated colors, no illegible text, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of Lavender, no light-mode board in this image.
